neg: The cat sat by the warm fire.
I love eating fresh green apples.
She walked her dog this morning.
We should buy more bread today.
He found his keys under the table.
My sister bakes amazing chocolate cookies.
They drove past the old church.
Birds sing loudly every spring day.
Please close the kitchen window now.
Our team won the big game.
Children play outside after lunch ends.
The river flows past quiet hills.
I drink coffee before work starts.
She reads books late at night.
We planted flowers near the fence.
He fixed his broken bike quickly.
Cold winter mornings make me sleepy.
My friend lives across the street.
They watched a funny movie together.
Rain fell softly during the night.
Please pass me that blue cup.
Our dog barks at strange noises.
She painted her bedroom bright yellow.
He cooks dinner every single evening.
Warm sunshine melts the spring snow.
I bought fresh fruit this week.
They climbed the tall green mountain.
My brother plays guitar very well.
We swim often during hot summers.
She lost her favorite red scarf.
He runs five miles each morning.
Bright stars filled the dark sky.
Please bring your umbrella tomorrow morning.
Our garden grows many sweet tomatoes.
They cleaned the messy living room.
I forgot my lunch at home.

articulation: Every word in the sentence starts with the same letter.
